bills.title: Artificial Intelligence Accountability Act
bills.summary: Requires transparency and audit controls for high-impact automated decision systems, including hiring use cases.

latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.

bills.title: Federal AI Transparency in Employment Act
bills.summary: Establishes notice and audit obligations for AI systems used in employment-related screening and recommendations.

latestAction.text: Placed on Senate Legislative Calendar under General Orders.
